summary:
Agent1 explains that dry heat causes protein coagulation and irreversibly alters microbial cell structures. The best option matching this description was identified as \boxed{D}. To keep it concise while capturing essential information:

Dry heat damages microbes through protein denaturation causing them to lose function; thus, \( \boxed{\text{Option D}} \) correctly describes its effect via coagulating proteins.
